heading: Restriction on use of appropriation for Botanic Garden
label: 2145 Restriction on use of appropriation for Botanic Garden
text: On and after , no part of any appropriation for the Botanic Garden shall be used for the distribution, by congressional allotment, of trees, plants, shrubs, or other nursery stock.July 31, 1958
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 216a of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
